title: Sweet Ukrainian Crumble Cookies
description: A classic Ukrainian cookie recipe with a crumbly twist, perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour and crumbly mixture.
In a large bowl, cream together cookies and sweet.
Add flour mixture to wet ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut into desired shapes using a cookie cutter.
Place cookies on prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden.
Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
